'''Seline''' was a remote outpost [[Planet/Legends|planet]]—cold, [[Stone/Legends|rocky]], harsh and barren—with a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] starport, located in the [[Dalonbian sector/Legends|Dalonbian sector]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]'s [[Tingel Arm/Legends|Tingel Arm]].

==History==
{{Quote|Gree energy condensers and pylons have been spotted in the contested area of the Western Ice Shelf. It's not clear whether they carry the same destructive potential as similar objects our forces have encountered on Seline, but we can't risk such powerful technology falling into Imperial hands.|Republic military mission dispatch|<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Archaeology|Seline's Secrets}}</ref>}}
During the [[Galactic War]] between the Republic and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]], several ancient Gree ruins were discovered on the planet.<ref name="Mission" /> Around that [[Time/Legends|time]] Republic and Imperial forces battled on the planet for control of two [[hypergate]]s left behind by the [[Gree (species)/Legends|Gree]].<ref name="TOR" /><ref name="TOR2">{{TORcite|type=general|Charging the Pylon|Ilum}}</ref>

In [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] fled Zonama Sekot aboard the ''Jabitha ''during an [[Second Battle of Zonama Sekot|attack]] on the planet by Republic [[Lieutenant governor/Legends|political leader]] and [[Outland Regions Security Force/Legends|security force]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]]. They guided the injured and dying ship to Seline, which was "thousands of [[Parsec/Legends|parsecs]]" closer to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] than any other feasible "emergency" location. The Jedi duo was met there at the starport's deserted hangar by [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] member [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and Jedi Master [[Thracia Cho Leem]], who counseled the young Skywalker after a very trying mission, then escorted him and his Master back to the capital. Kenobi had learned of Seline's existence years earlier, after a harrowing adventure with his own [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]].<ref name="Rogue Planet">''[[Rogue Planet]]''</ref> The deserted station, known only to the Jedi, was one of the closest [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] worlds to the original location of [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] in the [[Gardaji sector/Legends|Gardaji sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Seline was the last resting place of the [[Sekotan Personal Starship|Sekotan organic ship]], the ''[[Jabitha]]''.

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Seline was [[Battle of Seline|attacked]] by the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong|invaders]].<ref name="TEA" />
